name: Candied Carrot Orange Melange
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the orange and lemons in warm water for about 10 minutes to get maximum juice. Peel the orange and lemons, removing as much of the white pith with a knife as possible.
2. Chop finely using a blender or food processor.
3. Squeeze the orange and lemon pieces to obtain approximately 3/4 cups of juice (this may require an extra fruit).
4. In a bowl, combine the juice, carrots, citrus segments, and peels.
5. Measure this mixture and transfer it to an 8-quart saucepan.
6. For each cup of the mixture measured, add 1 cup of water and 2/3 cups of sugar.
7. Cook over medium heat until almost all liquid is reduced. This may take about an hour; the mixture will reduce by roughly two-thirds.
8. Fill sterilized half-pint jars with the hot mixture, leaving a 1/2-inch head space.
9. Seal jars properly and process in boiling water bath for 10 minutes.
This recipe makes about 3-1/2 pints.
